name: choice-properties
description: Static site. Deployed via Cloudflare Pages (GitHub push triggers auto-deploy). No local server. No backend. Backend = Supabase cloud.

scripts.preinstall:
node -e "console.error('
⛔ STOP: npm install is not allowed on this project.
   This is a static site with zero runtime dependencies.
   There is nothing to install. Do not run npm install.
   Read: p2/.agents/instructions.md
   Deploy path: edit files → push to GitHub → Cloudflare Pages auto-deploys.
'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.start:
node -e "console.error('
⛔ STOP: This project does not run locally.
   There is no server to start. This is a static site.
   Deploy path: edit files → push to GitHub → Cloudflare Pages auto-deploys.
   Read: p2/.agents/instructions.md
'); process.exit(1)"
